name: Bourbon Street Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the frozen broccoli, tuna fish, cream celery soup, seasoned bread crumbs, melted butter or margarine, water, and egg until well combined.
2. Place the mixture into individual ramekins.
3. Sprinkle cheese strips on top of each ramekin.
4. Bake for about 1 hour at 350°F.
5. Optionally, sprinkle additional bread crumbs on top if desired.
6. This recipe can also be prepared as a casserole in a single Pyrex dish.
